vocab.simpleEn: not really willing to do something
vocab.simpleZh: 不是很想做，心里有点抗拒。
vocab.exampleEn: I was reluctant to speak English at first because I was afraid of making mistakes.
vocab.exampleZh: 一开始我不太愿意说英语，因为我怕犯错。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use I was reluctant to... when explaining fear or hesitation.
vocab.upgradeZh: 解释害怕或犹豫时，可以用 I was reluctant to...

cycle.summaryEn: Learn the four sections, the timing, and what a 6, 7, or 8 answer looks like.
cycle.summaryZh: 先弄懂四个部分、时间安排，以及 6、7、8 分答案的样子。

meaningEn: This speaking word helps Becky sound clearer and more natural.
meaningZh: 这个口语词可以帮助 Becky 说得更清楚、更自然。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "reluctant" using Moreover, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "reluctant" 和 此外，... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
